commentary_text: The model favors Iran at 48%, while sportsbooks and Polymarket both favor Egypt, who command 45% and 46% respectively. The sharpest single gap appears on the Iran win probability, where the model sits 23 percentage points above the consensus. This divergence could reflect differential weighting of recent form, lineup changes, or injury developments that have moved real money toward Egypt since the model's last update. The dashboard surfaces this structural disagreement as a signal worth monitoring, not as evidence that either side has mispriced the matchup.
